title: A US Senate panel says it has ‘compelling evidence’ of Chinese influence inside Amazon
summary: Writing to a small-business owner on Staten Island, a researcher for the Senate Small Business Committee said Republican staff had been probing “Amazon negligence related to Chinese influence and have found compelling evidence.” The note named no evidence at all.
caption: output/2026-07-23/a-us-senate-panel-says-it-has-compelling-evidence-of-chinese-influence.txt
